title: Scroll Wheel in the Number Column on a Form
excerpt: We have noticed when a number column is used on a monday workform, you can use the scroll wheel while the cursor is in the entry to increase or decrease the number values. We need the ability to turn this feature off.

posts.author: KristaBowman (Krista Bowman)
posts.cookedHtml: We have noticed when a number column is used on a monday workform, you can use the scroll wheel while the cursor is in the entry to increase or decrease the number values. We need the ability to turn this feature off.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Great idea. Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
